title: StartingMaces
description: This plugin makes it so when u spawn in u get a permanent soul life mace and every kill upgrades it
body:
# CORE

When anyone spawns in the server you get given a mace. A normal mace. Every kill you get it upgrades to a mace and it gets better enchants and so on. **This plugin was made as a custom prompt by RedishSMP check his yotube channel at the end of this description.**

## NOTE
### MACES WONT BE UPGRADED IF U KILL MOBS, ONLY IF U KILL PLAYERS.

# Maces

## Normal Mace

nothing, just pure nothing. no enchantments nothing

## Wood Mace

**Wind Burst 1**

 To get this mace just get a kill.

## Grass Mace

**Density 2, wind burst 2**

To get this mace get 2 kills

## Ocean Mace

**Density 5, Wind Burst 3**

 To get this get 3 kills

## Son of the holy Mace

**Density 5, Wind Burst 3**
 
 *Passive: Strength 1.*

## The all powerful mace

**Density 10, Wind Burst 3**
 
 *Passive: Strength 1.*

# Models and texture

All of the models and textures are shown in gallery!

# resource pack link
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/starting-maces-resourcepack

# Youtuber that requested this:
https://www.youtube.com/@RedishSMP
